sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89879" key="prospaiste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσπαιστέον</orth>, <sense id="n89879.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must amuse oneself with</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τούτοις</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.710e</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
